title: AI Evaluation
description: Create and manage evaluation topics for AI-assisted grading

creator.my_topics_description: Manage your evaluation topics, edit questions and settings.
creator.statistics_description: View respondent counts, completion rates, and other statistics.

respondent.my_answers_description: View your answer history and submission records.
respondent.my_reports_description: View grading reports and feedback you received.
respondent.progress_description: View your answering progress and completion status.

grader.tasks_description: View pending grading tasks and execute AI-assisted grading.
grader.pending_tasks_description: View tasks that need your grading or review.
grader.completed_tasks_description: View your completed grading tasks and reports.
grader.publish_description: Publish grading reports for respondents to view.

topics.title: Topics
topics.browse_description: View and search evaluation topics, answer questions, and check your results.
topics.create_description: Create a new evaluation topic with questions and grading criteria.
topics.delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this topic? This action cannot be undone.
topics.name: Topic Name
topics.create_first: Create your first topic to get started
topics.public_description: Anyone can view and answer questions in this topic
topics.private_description: Only invited users can view and answer questions
topics.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this topic?
topics.version_description: View published versions of this topic and their question snapshots.
topics.publish_hint: Publish at least one question before publishing the topic
topics.instructions_placeholder: Enter exam instructions in Markdown format. These will be shown to respondents before they start answering.
topics.instructions_hint: Supports Markdown formatting. Leave empty to use no instructions for this topic.
topics.exam_mode_enabled: This topic will be displayed as an exam with timer and enhanced UI
topics.view_versions_description: View version history for this topic
topics.publish_confirm_description: Publishing will create a new version and make this topic visible to respondents. Are you sure you want to continue?
topics.publish_note_description: After publishing, the topic will be visible to authorized respondents. You can update the topic and publish new versions at any time.
topics.published_success_description: The topic is now available to respondents
topics.video_invalid_type: Please select a valid video file
topics.submit_hint_placeholder: Enter a hint to display on the submission page (Markdown supported)
topics.submit_hint_hint: Supports Markdown formatting. Will be shown on preview submission, confirm submission, and exam ended pages
topics.not_visible_until_hint: If set, respondents cannot access the exam before this time. Leave empty to allow immediate access.

versions.rollback_description: Are you sure you want to rollback to version {{version}}? This will restore the topic to the state at that version. Your current changes will not be lost, but the active version will change.
versions.rollback_success_description: Topic has been rolled back to version {{version}}

questions.title: Questions
questions.add_description: Add a new question to this topic
questions.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this question? This action cannot be undone.
questions.delete_description: The question and related answer records will be permanently deleted.
questions.drag_drop_hint: Drag & drop files or click to browse
questions.instructions_placeholder: Enter question-specific instructions in Markdown format. If set, these override the topic-level instructions.
questions.instructions_hint: Leave empty to use the topic-level instructions.

exam_content.title: Question Title
exam_content.content_placeholder:
# Question Background

Describe the background...

## Scenario Options

- Option A: ...
- Option B: ...
exam_content.content_hint: Supports Markdown: headings, lists, bold, italic, etc. Write background, scenarios, tasks, requirements all in one place.
exam_content.material_zip_hint: Upload a ZIP package for exam takers to download
exam_content.material_zip_upload: Click or drag to upload material package

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Manage who can view, answer, and grade your topics.
permissions.manage_description: Manage user access permissions and roles
permissions.remove_description: Are you sure you want to revoke this permission?
permissions.no_permissions_description: Add users to give them access to this topic. You can assign different roles like respondent, grader, or question creator.
permissions.batch_remove_description: Are you sure you want to remove permissions for {{count}} selected users? This action cannot be undone.
permissions.batch_modify_description: Grant or remove permissions for multiple users
permissions.usernames_placeholder:
Enter usernames, one per line or separated by commas/spaces
Example:
zhangsan
lisi
wangwu
permissions.usernames_hint: One username per line, or separated by commas or spaces. Duplicates will be automatically removed.
permissions.modify_no_usernames: Please enter at least one username

respondents.title: Respondents
respondents.tooltip: Unique users who entered the exam page (matches session list)

answers.title: Answers
answers.content_required: Please enter your answer or upload attachments
answers.submit_hint: Upload your answer files. You can also use the text input for additional notes.
answers.show_text_input_hint: If you cannot upload files, you can use the text input (not recommended)
answers.upload_recommended: File upload is the recommended submission method
answers.upload_drag_hint: Drag & drop files here or click to browse
answers.confirm_submit_description: This will overwrite your previous submission. Are you sure you want to continue?
answers.new_version_available: A new version of this question is available. You may want to re-answer.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Please read the following carefully before answering:
instructions.no_custom_instructions: No specific instructions for this question.
instructions.default_notice: Please follow the submission requirements carefully.
instructions.submission_notice: You can modify your submission multiple times. The system will keep your latest answer.
instructions.version_notice: If the question is updated, you will need to re-answer based on the latest version.

answers.link_disabled_hint: Link input disabled because attachments have been uploaded
answers.attachment_disabled_hint: Attachment upload disabled because link has been provided
answers.invalid_url_hint: Please enter a valid URL (e.g., https://example.com)
answers.respondents_tooltip: Unique users who entered the exam page (matches session list)
answers.tooltip: Total number of answers submitted by all respondents (including multiple submissions)

grading.title: Grading
grading.description: View and manage AI grading tasks for this topic.
grading.view_tasks_description: View and manage pending grading tasks
grading.retry_hint: Click retry to re-execute the grading task
grading.upload_report_description: Upload a custom report file as the final grading result
grading.report_not_published: This report has not been published yet.
grading.report_not_found: Report not found or has been removed.
grading.report_content_placeholder: Enter grading report content here (Markdown supported)...
grading.publish_error_no_human_report: Please edit and save a human grading report before publishing.
grading.view_execution_task_hint: View detailed execution log for debugging
grading.publish_ai_as_final_hint: Publish the AI grading result as the final report
grading.select_team_description: Select an AI team to perform automatic grading for answers.
grading.no_team_warning: Without an AI team, answers will need to be graded manually.
grading.conflict_description: This report has been modified by another user while you were editing. How would you like to resolve this conflict?
grading.conflict_info: Your changes could not be saved because the report was updated by someone else. You can:
grading.conflict_option_view: Load the server version and continue editing based on it
grading.conflict_option_overwrite: Overwrite the server version with your changes (may lose others' work)
grading.conflict_option_cancel: Cancel and keep editing your current version
grading.server_version_loaded: The server version has been loaded. Review and save again.
grading.conflict_keep_editing: You can review the content and try saving again.
grading.conflict_error: Conflict detected but failed to load server version
grading.no_group_teams: No group teams available. Please create a group team for grading.
grading.publish_disabled_hint: Please edit and save a report before publishing
grading.publish_dialog_description: Review the report content before publishing. You can also attach a file as the final report.
grading.attachment_hint: Upload a file to use as the final report. If not provided, the edited report will be used.
grading.publish_error_no_report: Please edit and save a report, or wait for AI grading to complete.
grading.auto_trigger_description: Configure when to automatically trigger AI grading.
grading.enable_auto_trigger_hint: Automatically start AI grading when answers are submitted
grading.timeout_description: Set the maximum time allowed for AI grading tasks.
grading.model_config_description: Select the AI model for grading
grading.prompt_template_placeholder_required: Required. Enter a template or import the recommended one below
grading.select_model_description: Choose an AI model for grading, or leave empty to use the bot's default model
grading.retry_config_description: Select grading mode and configure models
grading.ai_recovered_message: AI grading task was recovered, but the report content was not saved.
grading.chat_tasks_description: View all related AI grading execution processes for real-time auditing
grading.use_default_model_hint: You can confirm to use the default model, or select another model to override
grading.grading_mode_description: Choose between single model or multi-model aggregation grading
grading.manual_mode_info: No AI grading will be performed. Graders must manually review and grade all submissions.
grading.multi_mode_info: Configure multiple scorer models (1-N) to run in parallel, then aggregate results for a stable final score. You can use the same model multiple times.
grading.scorer_team_description: Select the team for scoring models (1-N models can be configured for parallel scoring)
grading.no_scorer_models: No scorer models configured. Add at least 1 model.
grading.aggregator_team_description: Select the team for the aggregator model (combines all scorer results into final report)
grading.aggregator_prompt_placeholder: Prompt template for aggregator model. Scorer reports will be added as attachments automatically...
grading.aggregator_template_hint: Available variables: {question_title} question title, {scorer_count} number of scorers, {scorer_summary} scorer list

exam_sessions.title: Exam Sessions
exam_sessions.no_sessions_description: Exam sessions will appear here when respondents start the exam.
exam_sessions.question: Question
exam_sessions.force_end_failed_description: Failed to force end exam session
exam_sessions.reset_dialog_description: This will reset the exam session for {{user}}. The respondent will need to start the exam again.
exam_sessions.completed_note: Note: Setting to completed will automatically create a grading task.
exam_sessions.force_end_dialog_description: This will immediately end the exam for {{user}} and create a grading task.
exam_sessions.force_end_warning: This action cannot be undone. Only use when the respondent abandons the exam or encounters technical issues.

answer_records.title: Answer Records
answer_records.use_exam_sessions: Please use the Exam Sessions tab to view answer details for each respondent.

exam.title: Assessment
exam.exam_mode_description: This topic will be conducted as an exam with time limits and an enhanced interface.
exam.instructions_placeholder: Enter exam instructions in Markdown format...
exam.instructions_hint: These instructions will be displayed to participants before the exam starts. Supports Markdown formatting.
exam.waiting_start: Exam will start soon, please wait...

upload.title: Submit Materials
upload.main_report_hint: Supports PDF, Word, TXT formats, up to 20 files
upload.interaction_hint: Supports PDF, images, text formats, up to 20 files
upload.bonus_agent_hint: Supports images, PDF, documents, up to 20 files
upload.bonus_multimodal_hint: Supports PPTX, PDF, images, MP4 formats, up to 20 files
upload.click_or_drag: Click to select or drag files here

supplementary.title: Supplementary Notes
supplementary.placeholder: Please enter your supplementary notes here...

submit.title: Submit Checklist
submit.confirm_description: Please confirm all materials have been uploaded
submit.confirm_hint: You can still return to answer after entering preview
submit.file_limit: Total attachments per question cannot exceed 20, currently uploaded {{count}}

confirm.title: Confirm Submission
confirm.description: Please confirm the following submission content is correct

modal.end_description: After ending answering, you will enter the review phase and will no longer be able to modify your answers.
modal.end_warning: This action cannot be undone. Please confirm you have completed all answers.
modal.leave_description: After leaving the exam, the assessment will end and you will no longer be able to view or modify your answers.
modal.leave_hint: Please confirm you have completed all checks and are ready to submit.

success.title: Submission Successful
success.description: Assessment materials have been submitted successfully.

time_warning.title: Exam Ending Soon
time_warning.description: There are {{minutes}} minutes remaining until the exam ends. Please complete your answers and prepare to submit.
time_warning.hint: Recommendation: Check if all required items are completed, and submit promptly after confirmation.

phase.qa_description: Please read the exam instructions carefully and click start when ready. The {{examDuration}} minute timer will begin

slots.title: Answer Slot Configuration
slots.description: Configure the submission slots for respondents
slots.no_slots_hint: Click the button above to add your first answer slot
slots.label: Display Label
slots.hint_placeholder: Help text displayed to respondents, supports Markdown
slots.markdown_syntax_hint: Supports **bold**, *italic*, `code`, lists and other Markdown syntax
slots.required_hint: Required slots must have content when submitting
slots.bonus_content_placeholder: Detailed description of the bonus question, supports Markdown
slots.delete_description: This slot configuration will be permanently deleted. Existing answer data will not be affected.

validation.invalid_key_format: Slot key can only contain letters and numbers (a-z, A-Z, 0-9)
validation.bonus_requires_title: Bonus slots must have a title

errors.please_login: Please login before accessing this page
